title: taraxacum glabrum
intro: Taraxacum glabrum, a lesser-known species within the dandelion genus, is a perennial plant characterized by its yellow flowers and toothed leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic, and has been used to treat conditions such as kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Taraxacum glabrum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and support the digestive system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum glabrum typically involve infusions, tinctures, or extracts of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be used to create teas, capsules, or topical creams.
